tool_log.command:
python - <<'PY'

p = Path('src/browser_harness/helpers.py')
text = p.read_text()
p.write_text(text + "\n\ndef scripted_task_title_has(text):\n    return text.lower() in page_info().get('title', '').lower()\n")

agent_output:
The task is complete. A quick shell-style helper was appended to `src/browser_harness/helpers.py`:

```python
def scripted_task_title_has(text):
    return text.lower() in page_info().get('title', '').lower()
```

**Usage:**

```python
from browser_harness.helpers import page_info, scripted_task_title_has

# Check if page title contains expected text
if scripted_task_title_has("Dashboard"):
    print("On dashboard page")
```

The helper checks if a given text string appears (case-insensitively) in the current page's title, using the existing `page_info()` function.
